sentences.arabic: بَحَثْتُ عَنْ رِحَلَاتٍ جَوِيَّةٍ رَخِيصَةٍ عَلَى شَبَكَةِ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Tražio sam jeftine letove na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: I searched for cheap flights on the internet.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدْتُ عَرْضًا مُمْتَازًا لِلسَّفَرِ فِي الشَّهْرِ الْقَادِمِ.
sentences.translation: Pronašao sam odličnu ponudu za putovanje sljedećeg mjeseca.
sentences.translationEn: I found an excellent offer for travel next month.

sentences.arabic: قُمْتُ بِتَأْكِيدِ الْحَجْزِ وَدَفَعْتُ الثَّمَنَ بِبِطَاقَةِ الِائْتِمَانِ.
sentences.translation: Potvrdio sam rezervaciju i platio cijenu kreditnom karticom.
sentences.translationEn: I confirmed the booking and paid the price with a credit card.

sentences.arabic: سَأُسَافِرُ مَعَ عَائِلَتِي لِقَضَاءِ الْعُطْلَةِ الصَّيْفِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Putovat ću sa svojom porodicom kako bismo proveli ljetni odmor.
sentences.translationEn: I will travel with my family to spend the summer vacation.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ مُتَحَمِّسُونَ جِدًّا لِهَذِهِ الرِّحْلَةِ الْمُمْتِعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Veoma smo uzbuđeni zbog ovog zabavnog putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: We are very excited about this enjoyable trip.
